sections.title: Journey 1 — Honeymoon planning (Intent Orchestrator, memory)
sections.note: Toggle: Intent Orchestrator (single). Persona: newlyweds planning a once-in-a-lifetime trip. Paste the lines in order — watch the agent remember the destination, dates, and budget across turns. Data: hits get_destination_inspiration (Maldives) and search_deals (Maldives) → DEAL-MALDIVES-001 'Maldives Honeymoon Overwater Escape', NZD 3,499pp.
lines: Hi, my partner and I just got married and we'd love to plan our honeymoon.
We're dreaming of an overwater villa somewhere tropical — the Maldives keeps calling us.
Let's go with the Maldives. We're thinking five nights in late November, and our total budget is around 8,000 New Zealand dollars for the two of us.
We'd love a mix of pure relaxation and a bit of snorkeling out on the reef.
Perfect. Can you find us the best Maldives honeymoon deal that fits everything I've told you?

sections.title: Journey 2 — 25th anniversary cruise (Intent Orchestrator, memory)
sections.note: Toggle: Intent Orchestrator (single). Persona: a couple celebrating a milestone. Highlights how the cruise specialist carries forward the region, ship style, and cabin preferences from earlier turns. Data: hits search_cruises (Europe / Danube) → CR-AMA-DANUBE7 '7-Night Romantic Danube River Cruise' on AmaMagna, balcony NZD 5,200.
lines: My wife and I want to celebrate our 25th wedding anniversary with a really special cruise.
We've always dreamed of cruising through the heart of Europe — somewhere with history and incredible food, like the Danube.
It's just the two of us. We'd prefer a smaller, intimate luxury ship and a balcony cabin, and we both love history and fine dining.
Can you recommend a cruise that matches everything — a European river cruise, balcony cabin, with a food and history focus?

sections.title: Journey 3 — Family reunion (Multi-Intent Orchestrator, parallel)
sections.note: Toggle: Multi-Intent Orchestrator FIRST. Persona: an organizer juggling a multi-generational trip. One message fans out to several specialists in parallel — flights, a holiday package, and tours — then the responses are merged. Data: search_flights (AKL→SYD) → FL-AKLSYD-001/002/003; search_holiday_packages (Fiji) → Outrigger Fiji (kids club); search_tours (Cultural) → 'Visions of Japan'.
lines: I'm organizing a family reunion for nine of us across three generations this spring.
I need flights from Auckland to Sydney for four of us, a beach holiday package in Fiji for the whole group, and a guided cultural tour idea the grandparents would love.
We're flexible on the exact dates, mid-range budget, and the grandparents want something cultural while the kids want the beach and snorkeling.

sections.title: Journey 4 — Flexible budget explorer (Multi-Intent Orchestrator, parallel)
sections.note: Toggle: Multi-Intent Orchestrator. Persona: a spontaneous traveler who wants ideas, a fare to watch, and a concrete flight — all at once. Shows inspiration + deal alert + flight search running together. Data: get_destination_inspiration (island escapes); create_deal_alert (AKL→Bali); search_flights (AKL→DPS, August) → FL-AKLDPS-001 Emirates EK449.
lines: I've got two weeks off and about 2,500 New Zealand dollars to play with — I'm open to ideas.
Suggest a few island escapes for that budget, set me a deal alert for flights from Auckland to Bali, and find me a flight from Auckland to Bali in early August.
I'm travelling solo, I love street food and temples, and I'd rather spend on experiences than fancy hotels.

sections.title: Journey 5 — Post-booking rescue (Intent Orchestrator)
sections.note: Toggle: Intent Orchestrator. Persona: a traveler whose plans changed. Routes to the post-booking concierge and resolves a real problem end to end. Data: get_booking_by_reference (HOT-847291, Auckland→Tokyo on NZ99) and get_baggage_policy (Air New Zealand economy → 23kg).
lines: My plans have changed and I need to adjust my trip — my booking reference is HOT-847291.
Can I push my return out by a couple of days, and what would it cost to change the flight?
And before I confirm, can you tell me the checked baggage allowance on Air New Zealand in economy?

sections.title: Journey 6 — Solo adventure, consultant match (Intent Orchestrator)
sections.note: Toggle: Intent Orchestrator. Persona: a traveler with a complex, high-touch trip who wants a human specialist. Demonstrates routing to the consultant-match agent with the trip captured. Data: search_tours (Peru) → TOUR-INTREPID-PERU9 'Inca Trail Express'; find_consultant (Adventure) → Emily Chen (CONS-AKL-001), then book_consultant_appointment.
lines: I'm planning a three-week solo adventure through Peru — the Inca Trail to Machu Picchu — and I'd really like to work with a specialist.
It's an active trip with multi-day hiking, and I'm hoping to go in September.
My budget is flexible for the right experience. Can you match me with a consultant who knows adventure travel?
